core_rule: Important files should have a known job.
inclusion_rule: A file deserves an entry if it: is edited often, is large/crowded, controls routing/page render/server/automation, defines guardrails or source-of-truth rules, generates output, IS generated output that agents might edit, stores config, is canonical template, has known common mistakes, connects multiple systems, or requires companion updates when changed.

categories.client-box-convention: Per-Client-Box file kinds (template-shape applies to all 28)

files.purpose: Top-level world-state, project identity, source-of-truth rules summary, Done Gate, ledger system map. Read first.
Current project moment — recent changes, active assumptions, carry-forward, next handoff. The cockpit log.
Project thesis, 10 NS goals, anti-goals, tradeoff rules, audit questions, Wholesome Enrichment principle.
Top-level + subdirectory map, ownership table, canonical-vs-generated lists, status taxonomy.
files.common_mistakes: forgetting to update §6 when promoting/demoting a file

files.purpose: Active problems with stable IDs, severity, urgency, close criteria. Append-only for past entries.
How agents talk across time — handoffs, warnings, lessons, attempts, cross-system notes.
17 active decisions with stable IDs, rationale, alternatives, consequences, do-not-undo-casually.
Universal Done Gate (8 questions) + 11 work-type Done Gates + Ledger Update Matrix + 55/45 build rhythm.
Defines what a Box is — concept, classes, status labels, BOX.md vs DIRECTORY.md, Local Agent Protocol.
How Boxes connect — manifest schema, ledger envelope, 3 routing tiers, 3 interpreter tiers, cycle policy. Runtime deferred to Phase C.
Universal trust ordering, per-domain trust orderings, Allowed-To-Know 4-bucket schema, conflict resolution.
External-system inventory + per-service contracts. NEVER store raw secrets here.
Roster of all ledgers and their build status. Must change in lockstep with GLOBAL_LEDGER.md §8.
React app shell — declares route table, hooks router into screens, owns top-level layout.
Every UI screen as a top-level component (HomeScreen, BoxesScreen, IntakeScreen, AnalyticsScreen, BriefingScreen, etc.). 11 surviving routes.
files.common_mistakes: stuffing widget logic here instead of components.jsx

files.purpose: Shared UI components — design-kit cards, admonition styling, dossier renderer, Boxes-page specialized renderers (Hugo + Brenda/Steve).
AutomationScreen rendering — workflow display, trigger surfaces, manual-fire UI.
Channel registry for Delegations picker. Channels: claude_code, clickup, slack, email, whatsapp, sms, note, internal, open_url.
files.common_mistakes: adding a channel without updating CONNECTIONS.md

files.purpose: Chat client and message rendering.
Tool/action handlers the chat can dispatch.
System-prompt assembly: bedrock structured truth + Pieces ambient context, voice profiles, lead enrichment.
files.common_mistakes: editing system prompt without bumping loader version

files.purpose: Conversation widget — message list, input, autoscroll, keyboard handling.
Static data tables and demo seeds for UI when bedrock data isn't loaded.
Delegation channel picker UI + send-flow orchestration on the front-end.
Score and rank items for home grid surfaces.
Lucide icon registry.
Loads bedrock JSON files into window.MissionControl at startup. The bridge between bedrock and UI.
files.common_mistakes: forgetting to bump version after schema change → stale cache hides new domain

files.purpose: Documentation of window.MissionControl shape — names of arrays, fields per record kind, expected types.
Project-wide CSS. Pastel palette variables, design-kit cards, admonition styling, layout primitives.
Single-page entry point. Loads vendor scripts + project JS/JSX/CSS with cache-busted version params.
files.rule: any time a referenced file changes, bump its ?v= here so browsers refetch
files.common_mistakes: editing JS without bumping ?v= → users see stale code

files.purpose: Standalone HTML reference for inbox guardrail contract. Pairs with comeketo-guardrails-agent.md.
Single-file stdlib HTTP server. Backs every UI route, proxies external services, spawns claude -p for delegations, manages _BLOCKED_DELEGATION_TOOLS, hosts /api/* endpoints, reads /.env at startup.
files.common_mistakes: leaking secrets in error messages; not handling MCP session expiry

files.purpose: Project-local agent instructions — Prime Directive (ledger discipline), canonical paths, scope gate, schema-by-example, index registration, ledger append, sitemap Done Gate. First file every Claude session reads.
files.when_not_to_edit: don't soften Prime Directive without explicit Decisions entry

files.purpose: Subprocess-agent-facing instructions for claude -p invocations.
Roster of agent personas the project recognizes. Per-Box AGENTS.md files override scope locally.
Per-page Asset Ownership / Change Checklist / History / Last Verified for every UI route. The UI Done Gate.
files.rule: any page/route/data-binding change is not done until this is updated

files.purpose: Agent-facing reference for inbox guardrails. Pairs with Guardrails.html and Auto/comeketo-inbox/SKILL.md.
Project overview for humans first finding the repo.
Roster of available skills.
Working scratchpad for Claude-related notes. Lower-stakes than CLAUDE.md.
Common Close API helpers, path resolution, shared utilities. Imported by every other bin/ script.
Recurring sweep that reconciles Close.com state into Client Boxes — pulls activities, updates 01_comms.md summaries, refreshes 00_meta.json flags, marks plan staleness on replies.
Determines which leads are ready for next scheduled fire — checks plan-day cadence, reply-gate state, frequency caps, guardrail flags.
Re-runs sweep + ready check.
Produces state/today.html snapshot.
Voice/persona helpers.
Orchestrator entry point.
Generates per-lead rollup HTML/markdown for the orchestrator state directory.
Routine catalog — every scheduled/triggered automation declared with trigger source, target, guardrails, log target.
Daily orchestrator snapshot. View of state, not state itself.
files.common_mistakes: agents see today.html looks 'wrong' and try to fix it directly. Fix the source data instead.

files.purpose: Daily orchestrator master snapshot. View of state, not state itself.

Operational contract for the Comeketo inbox. Hard gates (fee waivers, discounts, scope promises, price guarantees), auto-pauses, reply gates, frequency caps, NEPQ-style guidance, ballpark calculator integration.
NEPQ-style reference, guardrails detail, voice notes.
Calculates ballpark quotes from menu data.
Builds HTML email body from the template.
Pricing input. The single source of truth for ballpark quote math.
files.common_mistakes: editing pricing in the script instead of in this JSON

files.purpose: Loader authority. If a file is not listed here, the UI does not see it.
files.rule: every new file in people/, venues/, agents/, agent_plans/, triggers/, workflows/, hooks/, catalog/ must be listed here
files.common_mistakes: creating a new people/<slug>.json and forgetting to register it → invisible in UI

files.purpose: Project audit trail. Every non-trivial delegation, ledger change, decision, problem-status-change appends one line.
Inbox events log. Same append-only rule.
Runnable app agents — andre_escalation_ladder, global_ledger_steward, inbox_triage. Each has agents.md, prompt.md, optional tools.md.
Structured metadata — lead_id, name, smart_view_label, harvested-at, enrichment-tier, altitude, comms_dirty, _skip_outbound, plan-day-1 date, last-inbound-detected-at, last-sweep-at.
Curated executive summary of comms — derived from 01b_comms_verbatim.md.
Full Close.com chronological transcripts.
Raw Close API payloads.
Useful internal strategy from enrichment. NEVER customer-facing.
files.rule: Customer copy must ground in 01_comms.md / 01b_comms_verbatim.md / approved operator notes per SOURCE_OF_TRUTH §3.1 + §4 Allowed-To-Know.

files.purpose: Tactical send sequence proposal.
files.rule: Subordinate to comms, state, guardrails, approvals. A reply invalidates the plan until reviewed.
files.common_mistakes: treating plan text as executable copy without re-validating against current comms

files.purpose: Per-Box logic notes.
Per-Box skills inventory.
Per-Box automation notes.
Andre review/approval log — what's been raised, what was decided.
Andre's feedback per Box.
Post-close outcomes — close, followup, hold, referral, post-close handoff, outcome-ledger update.
Running operator log per Box — every meaningful change appended.
Trace of an explicit audit pass. First example: Brenda & Steve 2026-04-28_audit_marker.md.
Per-Box agent instructions / scope. Phase 1 Intake (DEC-2026-04-29-008) doesn't yet honor these in the ask system prompt — Phase 2 work.
Per-Box Claude scope override.
Per-Box Allowed-To-Know schema instance per SOURCE_OF_TRUTH §4.2.
files.status_note: Not yet authored in any Box. Hugo Casillas is the natural first test case (PROB-2026-04-28-001 partial close).

files.purpose: Per-staff voice/profile substrate. 10 boxes. Used by ai_instructions.js to inject coworker voice profiles inline.
Stamp for any new Box's local BOX.md.
files.when_to_edit: only when standard Box shape changes

files.purpose: Stamp for 'you are here' files in any directory.

update_triggers: file moves canonical → generated (or vice versa)

history.event: Phase 13 — initial creation. ~78 entries across 10 categories. Tier: global. First substantive file-level inventory of the project. Closes the 'where do I start with this file?' onboarding gap.
